title: ChargePoint Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
text: ChargePoint reported Q4 FY2026 financial results with margins expanding amid profitability push. For the first fiscal quarter ending April 30, 2026, ChargePoint expects revenue of $90 million to $100 million. ChargePoint is set to announce its fiscal Q1 2027 financial results on June 3, 2026, with analysts projecting a 7.5% improvement in EPS year-over-year. Q4 revenue reached $109M with record 33% gross margin, driven by strong European growth and operational improvements. New products and AI initiatives are expected to further boost margins and efficiency, while disciplined cash management and strategic partnerships position the company for growth. UBS lowered the firm's price target on ChargePoint to $7 from $9 and keeps a Neutral rating. JPMorgan lowered the price target to $5 from $8 and keeps an Underweight rating. B. Riley lowered the price target to $6 from $11 and keeps a Neutral rating.
